full_text:
Zhou Gu 周谷
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Gu (周谷)was born in Wu. Allowed Sun Quan to use public money. When Quan became ruler, didn’t give Gu office. Zhou Gu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
